justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's requested time and date in every turn.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering alternative options proactively.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent engaged in multiple avoidable round-trips by repeatedly asking the user for new times after reporting unavailability.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's repetitive responses and lack of proactive suggestions, making the user do all the work in finding an available slot.

overall_notes: The agent was stuck in a loop of reporting unavailability and asking the user to provide a new time, which led to a very inefficient and frustrating conversation.
